CustomField.description: Controls how NPPatch determines the reciprocal Relationship type. "List Setting" uses Reciprocal Relationship custom settings to map types by gender (e.g., Father to Daughter/Son). "Value Inversion" automatically inverts hyphenated types (e.g., "Parent-Child" becomes "Child-Parent"). Use "List Setting" for gender-aware reciprocals or "Value Inversion" for simpler type management.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How reciprocal types are determined: "List Setting" (gender-aware mappings) or "Value Inversion" (auto-invert hyphenated types).
CustomField.label: Reciprocal Method
